title: 寄せぬ、交えぬ、ワンカラー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after first hearing the rumors about Tosen Jordan, I
happen to see her as I pass by the school gates.

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are, Jordan! The teacher's looking for you!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know. The school just hit me up. I'm headed over now.

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Well, you better hurry! She seemed really angry... You can't skip class and practice. You might get kicked out, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I know.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Skipping class, not even showing up for tests... All that could be
overlooked if you were entering races, but you won't even train.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
What's going on here, Jordan? I know you were injured, but you never
let that affect you before... If you need someone to talk to, you know
I'm here for you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I dunno. I'm just, like... low-key in a slump, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Please take this seriously... I'm worried about you. Is it an issue of
motivation?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I. Don't. Know. Period. End of story.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... All right. Let's call this meeting adjourned. For now, I've made a worksheet summarizing this week's lessons. Once you finish, you may go.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: When you feel like racing again, you know where to find me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For real though, what was I supposed to say? Even I don't know what the
problem is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several hours after seeing her at the gates, I'm walking down the
academy corridors when I notice Tosen Jordan sitting in an empty
room, struggling with a worksheet.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: "Solve with a natural number, assuming the square root is also a natural number." What's that mean? Like, numbers in nature? What does that mean? Trees?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! This is straight up code! How am I supposed to know what to
do? This suuuucks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She slams her head dramatically into the desk. As she does, the
worksheet in her hands gets caught on something, causing it to rip.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Great. Just... great. I am... so done. Deceased.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
How's the homework coming along—huh? Did you... rip up your
worksheet?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah, well... I guess I did.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Well... you've made yourself clear. I see you have no intention of
improving yourself.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
But you MUST learn to use your words! I can't believe you would rip
up your worksheet just to prove a point!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From what I saw, the worksheet ripping was just an unfortunate
accident. Of course, if she just explains what happened, I'm sure the
teacher will understand.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whatever...

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: I'm trying to help you, you know. But if you don't work with me, I can't do anything.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Have you really lost your drive? You really want to stop racing? Truly?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I don't know. How am I supposed to know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But if that's how everyone sees it, then it doesn't sound that outta
pocket to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead of clearing her name, she simply turns her back on the teacher
and walks away. It's like she's given up... I decide to follow to make
sure she's okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I finally catch up to her, I find her carefully coating her injured
toenail with strengthener. Other nail care products are laid out
around her.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Stupid toenail. Stupid medical care. Stupid Tickezo, always crying whenever I treat it in our room, making me do it outside. It's all so... stupid.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: If it weren't for my stupid flimsy toe, maybe I—ugh. Forget it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sounds exhausted, but from her careful application, it's clear
she's treating her injury as best she can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't imagine someone who takes such good care of themselves
would want to stop racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So why is she refusing to race?
choice_data_list: (I'd like to hear how she really feels.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get my chance a few days later, when I spot Tosen Jordan skipping
class and wandering aimlessly around town.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's an academy trainer want with me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Talk? Ah... Did the school put you up to this? I'm sure having a
student skipping classes and training is a big yikes for admin.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but I've, like, lost my motivation or whatever. Don't waste your
time on me.
choice_data_list: I saw you taking care of your toe the other day.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What?! Wait, when?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly apologize for not saying anything at the time, but explain
that I've wanted to speak with her since then.
choice_data_list:
I can't shake the feeling that you still want to
race.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Because I was taking care of my toenail? You've got it all wrong.
I just feel weird if I don't treat it regularly.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You can't tell if I wanna run just from that. I mean, even I don't know what my deal is.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And, like, why's it any of your business, anyway? I'm not exactly
radiating main character energy over here, so what's the point?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growl...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I-ignore that! I just skipped breakfast, okay?!
choice_data_list: How about we get something to eat?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Now you're trying to bribe me with food?! I have some dignity, you know!
choice_data_list: We don't have to talk. We can just eat.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Okay, bet. But only if we go to that place and only if you'll let me eat as much as I want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the place Jordan pointed out, I find myself staring at a
flashy fast food restaurant.
